parameters-en.Time: Adjusts the length of time before the first repeat. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Delay Div: Divides the delay time into smaller increments.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the delay repeats and the dry signal. At 0%, no repeats are heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls the overall number of repeats heard for the entire sequence.
parameters-en.Slice Fdbk: Controls the number of repeats heard for individual slices. At higher values, you could call this "Super Chaotic Feedback."
parameters-en.Shuffle: Determines the likelihood of repeats shuffling/reordering. At 0%, repeats won't shuffle at all; at 100% all repeats will shuffle.
parameters-en.Pitch: Determines the likelihood of repeats playing back an interval higher or lower.
parameters-en.Reverse: Determines the likelihood of repeats playing backward. At 0%, all repeats play forward. At 100%, all repeats play backward.
parameters-en.Seq Drift: Determines the likelihood of the entire sequence changing every time it loops around. At 0%, the same sequence loops forever.
parameters-en.Smoothing: Higher values apply smoothing between slices and can give a synth-pad type quality; lower values maintain transients. Or set it just high enough to avoid pops and clicks.
parameters-en.Interval 1: Sets the pitch of some repeats, the likelihood of which is determined by the Pitch parameter (from an octave down to an octave up).
parameters-en.Interval 2: Sets the pitch of other repeats, the likelihood of which is determined by the Pitch parameter (from an octave down to an octave up).
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the slices, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the slices, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
